summary: Zone Category Manager feature testing COMPLETE. All backend APIs (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) pass. Admin Panel shows 9 tabs including 'الفئات' (Categories) tab. Zone Category Manager displays 15 category cards with Add/Edit/Delete functionality. Daily Sessions page loads zone types dynamically from API (15 options in dropdown).

issues: Console warnings: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement needed

backend_api_tests.GET_zone_categories_public: PASS - Returns 15 active categories sorted by order
backend_api_tests.POST_admin_zone_categories: PASS - Creates new category with unique value
backend_api_tests.PUT_admin_zone_categories: PASS - Updates category (color, name, icon, order)
backend_api_tests.DELETE_admin_zone_categories: PASS - Deletes category and verifies removal
backend_api_tests.nonexistent_category_404: PASS - Returns 404 for update/delete of missing category
backend_api_tests.category_fields_complete: PASS - All categories have value, label_ar, label_en, color, icon

admin_panel_tests.nine_tabs_present: PASS - Found 9 tabs in Admin Panel (including 'الفئات')
admin_panel_tests.categories_tab_clickable: PASS - Tab switches to Zone Category Manager

category_cards_tests.card_structure: PASS - Cards show Arabic name, English name, color icon, value key, order number, color bar

add_category_dialog_tests.dialog_fields_present: PASS - All fields found: name_ar, name_en, value, icon, order, color, save_btn

edit_category_dialog_tests.edit_button_opens_dialog: PASS - Clicking edit opens pre-filled dialog
edit_category_dialog_tests.value_field_disabled: PASS - Value/key field is disabled in edit mode
edit_category_dialog_tests.color_presets_available: PASS - Color picker and preset swatches available

delete_confirmation_tests.cancel_option_available: PASS - Cancel button closes dialog without deleting

daily_sessions_integration_tests.zone_type_dropdown: PASS - Shows 15 options loaded from API
daily_sessions_integration_tests.category_colors_displayed: PASS - Each option shows category color indicator
daily_sessions_integration_tests.expected_categories_present: PASS - Found مصليات الرجال, مصليات النساء, خدمات

critical_code_review_comments: ZoneCategoryManager.jsx (262 lines) - well structured component with proper state management
API endpoints properly protected with require_admin dependency
DailySessionsPage correctly loads ZONE_TYPES from API with ZONE_TYPES_FALLBACK as default
Minor: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components to fix accessibility warnings
seed_data_creation: 15 zone categories seeded via POST /api/admin/zone-categories/seed (already present from previous iteration)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 tested Zone Category Manager admin feature. Key data-testids: zone-category-manager, add-category-btn, category-card-{value}, edit-cat-{value}, delete-cat-{value}, cat-name-ar, cat-name-en, cat-value, cat-icon, cat-order, cat-color, save-category-btn, confirm-delete-cat, refresh-categories. Admin Panel has 9 tabs (grid-cols-9). Daily Sessions page fetches categories from GET /api/zone-categories and shows 15 options in zone type dropdown. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_zone_categories.py
